rationale: Prove the implication explicitly with `assert ... by`, introducing the antecedent and case-splitting on each result's `InvalidMessage` discriminator.  Both ensures conjuncts pin the result's view to the same spec witness `sht_demarshal_data(buffer@)@`, so in the both-valid case the two views coincide and `=~=` lifts that view-equality to structural equality (CSingleMessage's view is injective on variant tag + each field's view, and the underlying u64/Seq/EndPoint/CMessage are all extensional).  The both-Invalid case is the unit variant.  Each assert is justified by the ensures pulled in by the enclosing `if antecedent`, so no axiom is taken on faith.
